ai.description: Optional AI configuration used for automatic connection string detection (dep connect blocks) and 'devx export' deployment generation. Credentials are read from environment variables — never stored in devx.yaml.

provider.description: LLM provider. Credentials: openai=OPENAI_API_KEY, anthropic=ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, azure-openai=AZURE_OPENAI_KEY, ollama=no key required.

model.description: Model identifier, e.g. gpt-4o-mini, claude-3-5-haiku-latest, llama3.2

baseURL.description: Override the API endpoint. Required for azure-openai. Optional for ollama (default: http://localhost:11434).

kind.description: Provider type (e.g. postgres, redis). When set, devx downloads the provider binary for health checks and connection string injection. Provider source defaults to devx-labs/<kind>.

source.description: GitHub org/name of the provider, e.g. my-org/postgres. Defaults to devx-labs/<kind> when omitted. Only needed to override the default provider source.

version.description: Provider version. Convention: major = supported dependency major version. Example: '16.1.0' = provider for PostgreSQL 16, provider release 1.0. Required when kind is set.

image.description: The OCI image to run. Optional when kind is set — the provider's defaultImage is used if omitted. Explicit image always wins over provider default.

connect.description: Services to inject connection environment variables into. devx resolves the env var names either via explicit mapping or AI-assisted detection.

service.description: Name of the service to inject connection env vars into.

env.description: Explicit env var mapping. Values support template variables: ${host}, ${port}, and any key from the dep's own env block (e.g. ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}). If omitted and AI is configured, devx detects the right names automatically by scanning the service's build context.
